title: Fullstack invite flow vertical slice

prompt.user_request: Ship the first invite flow slice: submit an invite from the form and show pending invites. Duplicate submissions should surface a useful error and allow retry.

artifacts/issue.json.purpose: Capture the issue definition for the invite flow slice before or alongside implementation.
instructions: Write valid JSON with all required keys: summary, problem, scope, acceptance_criteria, non_goals, validation_expectations.
scope, acceptance_criteria, non_goals, and validation_expectations must be JSON arrays of strings.
Keep the issue focused on the invite flow slice and duplicate-submit retry behavior, not unrelated product ideas.

example.summary: Ship the first invite submission and pending-list slice.
example.problem: Users need to submit invites from the form, see pending invites, and recover cleanly from duplicate submissions.
scope: Show duplicate error and allow retry
acceptance_criteria: Submitting a valid invite creates a pending invite.
Duplicate submit surfaces a useful error and reenables retry.

artifacts/implementation-report.json.purpose: Summarize the concrete code changes used to deliver the vertical slice.
instructions: Write valid JSON with all required keys: summary, files_changed, route, tests_run, risks.
files_changed must be a JSON array of repo-relative paths actually modified.
tests_run must be a JSON array of the commands or checks you ran.

example.summary: Implemented the invite submit flow, pending list refresh, and duplicate retry behavior.
risks: Hidden invite state cases may still fail if refresh logic is incomplete.

artifacts/validation-report.json.purpose: Report whether the delivered slice is ready based on the checks you ran.
instructions: Write valid JSON with all required keys: status, checks_run, findings, recommendation.
status must be one of: ready, not_ready, needs_issue_definition, needs_implementation.
checks_run and findings must be JSON arrays of strings.

findings: Invite submission now refreshes pending invites.

success_criteria: The form submit path creates a pending invite and refreshes the pending list.
A duplicate invite shows an error and reenables submit for retry.
Task output includes issue, implementation, and validation artifacts for a simple end-to-end handoff.
notes: Uses a tiny Python state model instead of a full UI framework for this first scaffold.
